conflict.branchAIntent: cache results aggressively to optimize performance and avoid redundant computation
conflict.branchBIntent: no-cache policy to ensure data accuracy — every call must recompute from source
conflict.explanation: Branch feature/performance-mode uses "cache" while branch master uses "no-cache" for the same function — these are direct design opposites.

resolution: Accepted feature/performance-mode design: cache results aggressively to optimize performance and avoid redundant computation
